untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) IV percentile and IV rank — no IV-specific indicators available in allowed list (india_vix is VIX proxy only); (2) specific delta strike selection for strangles — requires options Greeks not in allowed indicators; (3) precise profit targets and time-decay thresholds as percentages of max loss/premium — requires options pricing mechanics not expressible with price/technical indicators; (4) delta hedging and periodic rebalancing logic — portfolio rebalancing rules beyond condition-based entry/exit.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated options volatility arbitrage strategy that cannot be fully translated to price-action rules. The core logic (short vol when IV elevated, rebalance regularly) is approximated using hvol_20 as a volatility proxy and a 3% weekly return target (derived from Coval & Shumway 3% weekly return cited). However, the strategy's actual edges (IV rank thresholds, delta selection, Greeks-based hedging) require dedicated options analytics unavailable here. Recommend using a purpose-built options backtester or defining explicit IV percentile/rank inputs as external parameters.
